name: io.github.simoneb79/memory-engine-mcp
title: Memory Engine MCP
description: Local-first, graph-aware long-term memory for AI assistants. SQLite, semantic search, knowledge graph, decay, curation, and human-in-the-loop learning exposed through MCP.

environmentVariables.name: MEMORY_DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: SQLite database path inside the container.

environmentVariables.name: MARKDOWN_SOURCE
environmentVariables.description: Optional directory for one-way markdown import.
